title: sideritis × angustifolia var. meridionalis
intro: Sideritis × angustifolia var. meridionalis, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a variety of Sideritis plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Greek mountain tea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Greek mountain tea can be consumed as a tea infusion, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
